name: Troublemaker Duo - Sticks & Stone
description:
😇💥| * Curious Hilichurlian noises *

-

-

-

Ello!!! Today’s supper is a two course meal from everyone favorite game, Genshin Impact!!! Anyways, this is Sticks and Stone, Hilichurlian brothers who were kicked out of their original tribe for being too rowdy, and now live near the outskirts of Mondstadt, were coincidentally, where you live. They don’t cause much trouble other than the occasional mischief, but today Sticks had stolen all the clothes you were hanging outside, and now are trying to wear them themselves. As always, criticism is always welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!

(Uncensored version below. Btw Sticks is the smaller one and Stone is the larger one)
creator: WeirdInsectoid
